---
title: "Sarah Harriet Selwyn"
---

## Sarah Harriet Selwyn

**Dates:** (1809/10-25 March 1907)

**Maiden name:** (Richardson)

### Description

wife of the Rt. Rev. George Augustus Selwyn

### Biography

Daughter of Sir John Richardson and Harriet Palmer, she was Caroline Abraham\'s first cousin;  she married (1839) the  Rt. Rev. George Augustus Selwyn.

### Letters

- Letter from Easter Eve [4 April 1896]
- Letter from Aug 11th 1893
- Letter from Aug 18th [1889?]
- Letter from Aug 9th [1889?]
- Letter from June 25th 1885
- Letter from Jan. 1, 1872.
- Letter from November 4, 1867
- Letter from March 5th [1862[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Novr 23d 1861
- Letter from July 7, 1861
- Letter from May 26th 1857
- Letter from March 28th [1857]
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from Novr 4th [1854]
- Letter from June 9, 1854
- Letter from May 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
